_meta.description: Canonical nav layout applied AFTER all manifest.d fragments merge (ADR-044). relocations: sourceId -> targetGroupId. settingsSection: top-level config/admin leaf ids lifted into the NC settings foldout (gear icon, outside the scrollable nav). removals: leaf menu-entry ids retired as duplicate navigation — their PAGES stay routable.

_settingsSectionNote: DataExchange and XapiStatementsMenu carry section:'settings' in the base manifest; AssistantMenu is an integration/config leaf; FeaturesRoadmapMenu (formerly section:'footer') is lifted here so the foldout is the single authoritative source for all settings-adjacent leaves. AdminHealthMenu is intentionally absent — it belongs inside the Insight group (admin-gated, visibleIf:admin).
